feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Build Apps asking login for Integrations
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following the tutorial in the Task 2: Install Data Integration and I am getting the below popup every time I select my BTP Destination as my trail account. Also, as mentioned in the exercise, if I search with S4HC_SAMLASSERTION_PO or MOCK_PURCHASE_ORDER, it is not showing me any values. I am using my BTP trail account. Please help me on how to proceed on this.

 

 

 

 

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
HI All,

I am currently working on a project in SAP Build Apps and have encountered an issue that I need your assistance with. Here’s a brief overview of the problem:

**Issue:**

I have a “Title” component in my application for which I have applied a style. Specifically, I have set the text size to "Header 1" using a dropdown in the style settings. While this size is perfect for desktop browsers, it appears too large on mobile browsers. I would like to dynamically change the text size to "Header 2" when the application is running on a mobile browser and revert it back to "Header 1" when it is on a desktop browser.

 

**Requirement:**

- On mobile browsers: Text size should change to "Header 2".

- On desktop browsers: Text size should remain as "Header 1".

 

Could you please guide me on how to achieve this dynamic adjustment based on the device type?

entry.title: Can SBPA include Build Apps?
entry.content:
G'day,

Build Apps are now able to trigger SBPA processes - https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/use-business-processes-in-sap-build-apps?locale=en-US

Is the reverse possible? Can a Build App be used as a Form within SBPA? 

Fiori Apps can now be included into SBPA as of late last year, but the ability into include a Build App would be much more powerful for a citizen developer. 

Any idea if this is on the road map if not already possible?

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Apps

entry.title: unable to delete items from Cart in Shopping App in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I am follwing the tutorials 7 - Trigger Process from Your App: STEP 6 , and when I click on Purchase, it is giving me the below pop-up. I am unable to delete some items in the cart. The Delete icon functionality is not working. I am not sure if I missed any thing during during the build. Can you please help me on how to delete the last two items from the cart?

 

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Test mail not working
entry.content:
I have created a destination for sending mail from SAP Process Automation. All the properties are added correctly as mentioned in the below blogs. Even though when I try to test the mail functionality I got error.

Blogs:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/send-emails-from-automation-without-outlook-in-sap-process-automation/ba-p/13542436 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/mail-destination-on-sap-build-process-automation/qaq-p/12654497 

Error:

 

Destination: 

 

Note: The Gmail password I generated was in the below format, so entered the same with whitespaces
           abcd efgh ijkl mnop

entry.title: SAP Build Apps REST API direct integration Error: Load failed, status -1
entry.content:
I'm trying to use the REST API direct integration in SAP Build Apps.

I fill out the Resource ID and Resource URL in the BASE tab

Then turn on and fill out the Relative path in GET COLLECTION (GET) tab

But when I try to test that get collection route, I get an error (Error: TypeError: Load failed, status -1)

When sending a GET request to the same address from Postman, status is 200 OK.

 

What could be the cause for status -1? Is there a way to get more info out of SAP Build Apps about the error and possible causes? How to proceed from here?

entry.title: Is there a way to access SAP Build Backend in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi,

does anyone know if there is any way to access the SAP Build backend like visual cloud functions in SAP Build Process Automation? I have an approval workflow and need to save the result in our backend. But I can't find a way to do it.

Best regards,

Bastian

entry.title: Timeout of 120000ms exceeded, Unable to fulfill proxy request
entry.content:
I'm putting together a CSV import using Build apps, with a Desitination pointing to a python app deployed on BTP.

Everything works fine, until I hit the 120000ms (2 minute) timeout when processing a large file, at which point the Build app throws an error.

Checking the logs, the python app is still working through the file after the 2 minute timeout, and completes fine, it looks to be the BTP DESTINATION itself which is timing out and reporting an error when there is none.

I'm not sure if the issue is down to DESTINATION parameters, or with SAP BUILD apps itself.

What timeout parameters are available to set/try?

I've tried HTML5.Timeout, Timeout, and ClientReadTimeout. Nothing seems to extend anything over 2 mins.

 POST https://ndbs-build.preview.eu10.apps.build.cloud.sap/destinations/SIMILARITY_SEARCH_LOADER_NO_AUTH 500 (Internal Server Error)
[NEW] Explain Console errors by using Copilot in Edge: click 
 to explain an error. Learn more
Don't show again
VM111:4 LOG: 
{code: 'requestFailed', status: 500, message: 'Request failed with status code 500', rawError: {…}}
code
: 
"requestFailed"
message
: 
"Request failed with status code 500"
rawError
: 
error
: 
"timeout of 120000ms exceeded"
message
: 
"Unable to fulfill proxy request"

entry.title: How can I implement a feature to mark on images in SAP Appgyver?
entry.content: The "Marker Overlay Container" component in the marketplace isn't working properly. I set an image for the component, but it's not displaying in the preview. Can anyone help with this issue?

entry.title: SAP Build Apps navigation with date as key
entry.content:
Hello all!

I'm developing a Build Apps application with an ABAP environment backend. The ABAP environment is on SAP BTP, and serves an endpoint with the "equipment" API implementation. I've imported this API via destinations and created an "Data Integration":


This specific API has a date "ValidityEndDate" key property. In the app I'm developing there's a list of equipments and, if you select one, you should navigate to an object page. 




The issue I'm having is that the request has the date malformed, causing an URI invalid error. I've tried to change the internal structures to different text, date or date/time formats, with no avail. 


Do anyone have an idea on what I could do different here? Is there any transformation I could do to this element?

Thank you very much for your reply!

BS,
Rafael

entry.title: SAP Build Apps imageURL
entry.content:
Hello all!

I'm trying to add an image to my object page application in SAP Build Apps, but it's not working correctly. The app queries an endpoint on an ABAP environment running on SAP BTP. The SAP Fiori preview page works fine with the image URL, showing the image correctly. I've achieved this by creating an association with an "image" entity, and a property called "imageURL" in the main entity has a URL pointing to the selected "image" entity.

The issue I'm having with SAP Build Apps is that the images don't show in the image list. I can list the objects, but the images won't appear. The request returns a 200 status, but the response contains a message: "Failed to load response data: No content available because this request was redirected".

I tried to expand the main entity to the images entity, but I have not found a way to do so.

Does anyone have any ideas about what I might be doing wrong?

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,

Rafael

entry.title: SAP Build apps local preview issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are developing apps in build apps in our customer subaccount. It was working perfectly fine till last week but from this week i have a problem running apps locally.

The dolan timestamp goes to error 

After few seconds i get network error like below

The same app from the same build lobby works fine for my other colleagues. Am i missing some config?? What would have changed suddenly. 

@beapasch - Any ideas on this issue?

Thanks and Regards,

Navya

entry.title: SAP API Hub- Add new environment
entry.content:
I am following the tutorial to create SAP Build Automation, however I am stuck at the point to create new environment in the API Hub as mentioned in below link

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-run-process-api-trigger.html

I entered all the fields namely:  Display Name, Starting URL, Client ID and Secret, Authentication Domain, Consumer subdomain. But still it shows a pop up that a mandatory field is missing.

Can some one please help.

entry.title: Custom Script parameters in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I am trying to figure out how to input and output custom variables in a custom script in SAP Build Process Automation. It seems that the input parameter is not inputting any value into the script and it is not outputting anything either. The error I receive when trying to use the output param is 

"Invalid Argument: CommonFunctions.set: no valid value provided"

The script(step 116 of the automation) is as follows:

 

function convertWarehouseNum(warehouseNumOfPlantToCopyFrom) {
   
    const match = warehouseNumOfPlantToCopyFrom.match(/^([a-zA-Z]+)(\d+)$/);
   
    if (!match) {
        throw new Error('Invalid input format');
    }

    const letter = match[1];
    const number = match[2];
   
    // Increment the number by 1
    const incrementedNumber = (parseInt(number, 10) + 1).toString().padStart(number.length, '0');
   
    // Return the new string with the incremented number
    const warehouseNum = letter + incrementedNumber;

    return warehouseNum;
}
 
The input parameter is Step115.warehouseNumOfPlantToCopyFrom (output param of previous step)
The output parameter is Step116.warehouseNum
 
Please let me know if there is a solution.
 
Thanks

entry.title: Cannot build ios or android app error: Configuration Error: Missing Text Secrets How to resolve?
entry.content:
Good day,

We are experiencing the following error:

any ideas on how to resolve this? we have uploaded the IPA file with the respective password.

entry.title: CSRF token error(403 Post ) fails when making calls from the SAP Build Apps to ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have developed an application using SAP Build that connects to an ABAP on Cloud system. In SAP Build Apps, the POST call used to create records works correctly. However, after deploying the application to SAP Workzone, the POST call fails with a "503 CSRF token validation failed" error.

Could you please assist in resolving this issue?

Is there any config needed in the SAP Build WorkZone? 

Below is the destination details

 

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Preview is not working in IOS Build Apps Application
entry.content: I always get session expired error and I tried entering the code many times.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello, experts
I have a question about Build Apps. I understand that the build app is based on Low code/No code
Can't you draw a screen using codes such as ABAP or JAVASCRIPT at all? I wonder if I can draw a screen by directly inserting the code rather than calling it through OData. For example, I drag and use a button with drag and drop, but I wonder if it is possible to draw a button on the screen by squeezing it into code at the same time
Rather than writing free JavaScript code like in a typical coding environment, it can be used in a limited environment. For example, processing a specific variable or adding a simple calculation logic, is that right?

entry.title: Answer to tutorial question in SAP Build
entry.content:
In the SAP Build tutorial, there is a question asking: "In the example, what is the barcode number of the scanned food item (in the picture just above with the mobile phone)?". I have put the answer as 0031200016034 but it tells me that that is incorrect. I have tried other variations such as 031200016034, 0 31200 01603 4 but all are incorrect.

If anyone has completed this tutorial, can you give some suggestions or hints as to what the correct answer is?

entry.title: How to integrate BTP DMS with SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to upload a file into BTP DMS(Document Management Service) via Build apps. I have used "pick files" and the JS function for the upload functionality. but the Java script function is not working properly.

Could anyone provide some clarity on this if they have integrated BTP DMS with SAP Build Apps?

Regards,

Malar
